custom_values.description: Visual device using lines or labels to point out specific product features or benefits
Mimics phone notification, alert, or pop-up interface with interactive elements (Accept/Decline buttons, etc.)
Shows progressive results over time periods (e.g., 'After 3 days, 14 days, 30 days') with increasing benefits
Mimics article or blog post style with headline/subheadline format, often poses question or reveals insight
Mimics text message or chat conversation interface (iMessage bubbles, SMS style) showing peer-to-peer dialogue
Mockup of outdoor billboard or large-format advertising placement on buildings/highways
2x2 multi-panel grid combining product shots, lifestyle images, and stat copy into a single creative unit
Mimics Instagram Stories Ask Me Anything interactive Q&A sticker format with viewer question and overlaid response text on a photo
